sections.name: convertkit-newsletter-form
sections.html:
Subscribe

Get product updates monthly.
sections.css: form { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; max-width: 24rem; margin: 1.5rem auto 0; } input { flex: 1; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius); } button { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-fg); border: 0; border-radius: var(--radius); font-weight: 600; }
